{"step_by_step_thinking": "The query mentions that porosity may occur if the flask is placed too soon during the processing of methyl methacrylate. Porosity typically refers to voids or bubbles within the material. In the context of dentures, porosity near the borders would be more noticeable and affect the fit and integrity of the denture. Placing the flask too soon might allow air to be trapped, leading to porosity near the borders where the material is thinner and more susceptible to such defects.", "answer_choice": "B"}
